{{Quote|My mother worked for AGR, too, as did most all of my relations. It was hard work, but good work.|[[Soontir Fel/Legends|Soontir Fel]]|<ref name="X-Wing Rogue Squadron 25">[[X-Wing Rogue Squadron 25|''X-Wing Rogue Squadron'' 25]]</ref>}}
'''Allied Grain and Roughage''', or '''AGR''', was an agricultural company that ran an [[agro-combine]] on [[Corellia/Legends|Corellia]], and possibly other [[Planet/Legends|planets]].

[[Baron/Legends|Baron]] [[Soontir Fel/Legends|Soontir Fel]] was the son of a transport flier for the company.

The company sponsored an annual [[Harvest Festival]] on Corellia to celebrate the completion of a harvest.

{{Company-stub}}
